---
title: "Photography"
---

A selection of photographs from my camera. Click any image to view it full-size.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Build the gallery from whatever web-friendly images live in photos/.
# Drop new JPGs into that folder and re-render — the grid updates automatically.
imgs <- list.files(
  "photos",
  pattern = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|JPG|JPEG|PNG|WEBP)$",
  full.names = FALSE
)

if (length(imgs) == 0) {
  cat("*No photographs yet — check back soon.*\n")
} else {
  cat('<div class="gallery">\n')
  for (f in imgs) {
    src <- file.path("photos", f)
    alt <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(f)
    cat(sprintf('  <img src="%s" alt="%s" loading="lazy" />\n', src, alt))
  }
  cat('</div>\n')
}
```

```{=html}
<!-- Minimal self-contained lightbox: click a thumbnail to view it full-size -->
<div id="lightbox-overlay" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Photo viewer">
  <img id="lightbox-img" alt="" />
</div>
<script>
(function () {
  var overlay = document.getElementById("lightbox-overlay");
  var big = document.getElementById("lightbox-img");
  document.querySelectorAll(".gallery img").forEach(function (thumb) {
    thumb.addEventListener("click", function () {
      big.src = thumb.src;
      big.alt = thumb.alt;
      overlay.classList.add("open");
    });
  });
  function close() { overlay.classList.remove("open"); big.src = ""; }
  overlay.addEventListener("click", close);
  document.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
    if (e.key === "Escape") close();
  });
})();
</script>
```
